sweep-saglam-tuzun.标题: Implications of Growth in ETFs: Evidence from Mutual Fund to ETF Conversions
sweep-saglam-tuzun.判断理由: analyzes how these conversions affected equity market volatility and liquidity.

sweep-keywords.标题: The Role of Taxes in the Rise of ETFs
sweep-keywords.判断理由: reports yearly statistics on capital gains distributions as well as realized and unrealized capital gains for U.S. equity funds
